title: Smoky Burrito Chicken
description: A rich and flavorful burrito dish with a smoky twist, featuring chicken as the main protein. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner or a casual gathering.

ingredients.name: smoky chipotle peppers in adobo sauce
shredded cheese
ingredients.notes: cheddar or Monterey Jack work well

instructions: Season the chicken with salt, pepper, and cumin. Cook in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the diced onions and bell peppers to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the smoky chipotle peppers and cook for 1 minute.
Add the norte beans to the skillet and stir to combine.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the burritos by spooning the chicken and bean mixture onto a tortilla, followed by shredded cheese.
Fold the bottom half of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the burrito up tightly.
Place the burritos seam-side down on a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the tortillas are crispy.
